sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ الْخَمْسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz je drugi od pet stubova islama.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second pillar of the five pillars of Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ: "بُنِيَ الْإِسْلَامُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ: شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللهِ، وَإِقَامِ الصَّلَاةِ..." [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: "Islam je sagrađen na pet stvari: svjedočenju da nema boga osim Allaha i da je Muhammed Allahov poslanik, i obavljanju namaza..." [Bilježi el-Buhari u Knjizi o imanu].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (PBUH) said: 'Islam is built upon five: testifying that there is no god but Allah and that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah, and establishing prayer...' [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of Faith].

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ الصَّلَاةُ الْمُسْلِمَ عَلَى التَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ خَالِقِهِ خَمْسَ مَرَّاتٍ فِي الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz pomaže muslimanu da se poveže sa svojim Stvoriteljem pet puta dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer helps the Muslim connect with his Creator five times a day.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَنْهَى عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنْكَرِ وَتَشْرَحُ الصَّدْرَ.
sentences.translation: On odvraća od razvrata i zla i donosi smiraj u prsa.
sentences.translationEn: It restrains one from shameful and evil deeds and brings peace to the heart.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نُحَافِظَ عَلَى أَوْقَاتِهَا بِخُشُوعٍ وَطُمَأْنِينَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Moramo čuvati namaz u njegovo vrijeme uz skrušenost i smirenost.
sentences.translationEn: We must maintain its timings with humility and tranquility.
